ksa_text: Establish and operate continuous monitoring programs for deployed AI systems to track operational performance, detect degradation and behavioral drift.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain Risk Management KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.432) to justify inclusion for the Chief of Staff to CDAIO. Without stronger framework alignment, this task KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain task KSA be expected in real-world Chief of Staff to CDAIO roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Job market analysis and framework role definitions confirm Risk Management is not a standard competency expectation for Chief of Staff to CDAIO. Edge-case exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence does not support including this edge-domain KSA in the Chief of Staff to CDAIO competency profile. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Insufficient signal (score 0.432) and edge-domain placement (Risk Management) do not meet inclusion threshold for the Chief of Staff to CDAIO. All passes support exclusion.
